// src/data/itinerary.js
import { Plane, MapPin, Clock } from "lucide-react";

export const itinerary = {
  title: "Paris & London",
  dates: "Oct 12 ÔÇô Oct 20",
  days: [
    {
      id: 1,
      placeKey: "cdg",
      time: "Airport Pickup ┬À 09:00 AM",
      title: "Day 1: Paris ÔÇô Arrival & Check-in",
      place: "CDG Terminal 2",
      icon: Plane,
      img: "place1.jpg",
    },
    {
      id: 2,
      placeKey: "louvre",
      time: "Louvre Museum ┬À 10:00 AM",
      title: "Day 2: Paris ÔÇô Culture & Cuisine",
      place: "Louvre Museum",
      icon: MapPin,
      img: "place7.jpg",
    },
    {
      id: 3,
      placeKey: "eiffel",
      time: "Evening Walk ┬À 07:00 PM",
      title: "Day 3: Paris ÔÇô Iconic Sights",
      place: "Eiffel Tower",
      icon: MapPin,
      img: "place8.jpg",
    },
    {
      id: 4,
      placeKey: "coventgarden",
      time: "Hotel Check-in ┬À 01:00 PM",
      title: "Day 5: London ÔÇô Arrival",
      place: "Covent Garden",
      icon: MapPin,
      img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529655683826-aba9b3e77383?q=80&w=900&auto=format&fit=crop",
    },
    {
      id: 5,
      placeKey: "bigben",
      time: "City Walk ┬À 05:00 PM",
      title: "Day 6: London ÔÇô Landmarks",
      place: "Big Ben & Westminster",
      icon: MapPin,
      img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505761671935-60b3a7427bad?q=80&w=900&auto=format&fit=crop",
    },
    {
      id: 6,
      placeKey: "britishmuseum",
      time: "Museum Visit ┬À 11:00 AM",
      title: "Day 7: London ÔÇô History & Culture",
      place: "British Museum",
      icon: MapPin,
      img: "place5.jpg",
    },
  ],
};

// src/pages/Profile.jsx "use client"; import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; import Card from "../../../shared/ui/Card"; import Button from "../../../shared/ui/Button"; import { useUser } from "../../../app/providers/UserProvider"; import { useTrip } from "../../../app/providers/TripProvider"; import { MapPin, Calendar, Plane, Hotel, Star, TrendingUp, Award, Heart, Settings, Edit3, Camera } from "lucide-react"; const Profile = () => { const { user } = useUser(); const { trips } = useTrip(); const router = useRouter(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview"); // Calculate stats from actual trips const tripStats = { totalTrips: trips.length, upcomingTrips: trips.filter(trip => new Date(trip.dates.split(' - ')[0]) > new Date()).length, completedTrips: trips.filter(trip => new Date(trip.dates.split(' - ')[1]) < new Date()).length, totalDestinations: [...new Set(trips.flatMap(trip => trip.locations))].length, totalBudget: trips.reduce((sum, trip) => sum + (trip.budget?.total || 0), 0) }; const personalityInsights = { "The Explorer": { icon: "­ƒù║´©Å", description: "Adventure seeker who loves discovering new places and cultures", strengths: ["Cultural immersion", "Outdoor activities", "Spontaneous travel"], recommended: ["Hiking destinations", "Cultural festivals", "Off-the-beaten-path experiences"] }, "The Relaxer": { icon: "­ƒÅû´©Å", description: "Peaceful traveler who values relaxation and comfort", strengths: ["Wellness retreats", "Beach destinations", "Luxury experiences"], recommended: ["Spa resorts", "Island getaways", "Quiet countryside"] }, "The Foodie": { icon: "­ƒì¢´©Å", description: "Culinary enthusiast who travels for food and dining experiences", strengths: ["Local cuisine", "Food markets", "Cooking classes"], recommended: ["Culinary tours", "Wine regions", "Street food destinations"] }, "The Culture Vulture": { icon: "­ƒÅø´©Å", description: "History and art lover who seeks cultural enrichment", strengths: ["Museums", "Historical sites", "Art galleries"], recommended: ["UNESCO sites", "Cultural festivals", "Architectural tours"] } }; const currentInsights = personalityInsights[user.personalityTag] || personalityInsights["The Explorer"]; const upcomingTrips = trips.filter(trip => { const startDate = new Date(trip.dates.split(' - ')[0]); return startDate > new Date(); }); const pastTrips = trips.filter(trip => { const endDate = new Date(trip.dates.split(' - ')[1]); return endDate < new Date(); }); return (
{/* Header Section */}
{user.name?.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
{/* User Info */}

{user.name}

{currentInsights.icon} {user.personalityTag}

Based in {user.basedIn} ÔÇó Home airport {user.homeAirport} ÔÇó Member since {user.memberSince}

{/* Stats Grid */}
{tripStats.totalTrips}
Total Trips
{tripStats.upcomingTrips}
Upcoming
{tripStats.totalDestinations}
Destinations
${tripStats.totalBudget.toLocaleString()}
Total Spent
{/* Tab Navigation */}
{[ { id: "overview", label: "Overview" }, { id: "trips", label: "My Trips" }, { id: "insights", label: "Travel Insights" }, { id: "bookings", label: "Bookings" } ].map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* Tab Content */}
{activeTab === "overview" && (
{/* Personality Insights */}
{currentInsights.icon}

Your Travel Personality: {user.personalityTag}

{currentInsights.description}

Your Strengths

    {currentInsights.strengths.map((strength, idx) => (
  • {strength}
    • ))}

Recommended For You

    {currentInsights.recommended.map((rec, idx) => (
  • {rec}
    • ))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions
)} {activeTab === "trips" && (
{/* Upcoming Trips */} {upcomingTrips.length > 0 && (

Upcoming Trips

{upcomingTrips.map((trip) => (
router.push(`/planner/${trip.id}`)} >

{trip.title}

{trip.dates}

{trip.locations.join(" ÔÇó ")}

${trip.budget?.total || 0}
Budget
))}
)} {/* Past Trips */} {pastTrips.length > 0 && (

Past Adventures

{pastTrips.map((trip) => (
router.push(`/planner/${trip.id}`)} >

{trip.title}

{trip.dates}

{trip.locations.join(" ÔÇó ")}

Completed
Trip finished
))}
)} {trips.length === 0 && (

No trips yet

Start planning your first adventure!

 )}
)} {activeTab === "insights" && (

Travel Insights

Travel Patterns

Average trip duration 7 days
Favorite season Summer
Budget per trip ${Math.round(tripStats.totalBudget / Math.max(tripStats.totalTrips, 1))}

Achievements

First Trip
Welcome to the travel community!
{tripStats.totalTrips >= 3 && (
Seasoned Traveler
3+ trips completed
)}
)} {activeTab === "bookings" && (

Bookings Overview

Your flight, hotel, and activity bookings from upcoming trips will appear here for easy access.

{/* Mock upcoming bookings */} {upcomingTrips.length > 0 && (
Next Flight
{upcomingTrips[0].locations[0]} ÔåÆ {upcomingTrips[0].locations[1] || upcomingTrips[0].locations[0]}
Booking reference: ABC123 ÔÇó Economy
Hotel Reservation
Luxury Resort ÔÇó {upcomingTrips[0].locations[0]}
Check-in: {upcomingTrips[0].dates.split(' - ')[0]} ÔÇó 3 nights
)} {upcomingTrips.length === 0 && (

No upcoming bookings

Plan a trip to see your bookings here

)}
)}
); }; export default Profile;
